title: Singapore Primary Higher Chinese Paper 2 question-section detection output (hc v1.1)
description: JSON shape emitted by Cursor agent higher-chinese-paper-2-question-section-detector.md (spec version v1.1). **`schema_version`** **`high-chinese-v1.1`**. Extends high-chinese-v1.0 with a required per-section `question_info` array (one element per question index) with marks and page metadata, analogous to Mathematics/Science detectors—the sequence of `question_index` values is canonical (replacing the high-chinese-v1.0 `question_indices` array). Older shapes use **`higher_chinese_paper2_questions_section.v1.0.schema.json`**. See agent doc and higher_chinese_exam_paper2_question_types.md for semantics.

schema_version.description: Higher Chinese Paper 2 detection contract; must be `high-chinese-v1.1`. Older payload shape: **`high-chinese-v1.0`** (v1.0 schema file).

sections.description: Detected sections in document reading order.

uuidOrEmpty.description: `pdf_files.id` from Ai Study Buddy PdfFileManager (UUID); empty string when unset or lookup miss.

path.description: Canonical absolute path (`PdfFile.path`) from `PdfFileManager.get_file_by_path` after normalizing inputs, or from `get_file(file_id)`. Use "" only when unavailable.

role.description: How this file was used for detection (merged = 试题+作答簿 or single combined booklet).

notes.description: Per-file caveats (scan quality, encrypted, duplicate page order, lookup miss, …).

files.description: Input PDF paths the detector relied on (question booklet, optional answers booklet, or one merged file).

hints.description: Parent-supplied hints (expected page ranges, OCR snippets, filename keywords, etc.).

notes.description: Detector-side input summary (which inputs were missing, render settings, etc.).

generation_model.description: Actual detector model id (never the YAML orchestration sentinel "inherit").

confidence.description: Aggregate confidence for the entire detection run.

notes.description: Run-level commentary (merged PDF quirks, missing booklet, render failure, …).

question_index.description: Printed top-level question number (`Q1`, …), matching legacy high-chinese-v1.0 `question_indices` strings.

question_mark.description: Marks for this question as printed or implied on the paper.

start_page.description: 1-based page index (within the inspected PDF) where this question first appears.

end_page.description: 1-based page where this question ends when it spans pages; omit if single-page.

printed_section_title.description: Verbatim printed section or subsection title from the PDF when it differs from the canonical `question_type` label. Omit or use "" when the paper already matches the canonical name or the title is unknown.

section_total_marks.description: Total marks for this detected section. Include only when confident (i) the numeric total read from the paper is correct and (ii) that total applies to this section alone. Omit when uncertain or illegible.

answers_in_separate_booklet.description: Required for all 4 Higher Chinese question types. True when the official layout uses a distinct answers booklet (作答簿); false when answer spaces appear on the question pages.

question_info.description: Per-question metadata in reading order—canonical replacement for the flat `question_indices` list in high-chinese-v1.0.
